creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
Updates py-logilab-common to 0.45.2.  This also fixes a bug where if setuptools are installed then all the files get installed in the wrong location.  [The same change needs to be done for devel/py-astng and devel/pylint => +MAKE_ENV+=     NO_SETUPTOOLS=yes ]

Fix: See patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
